_dry_run_note: Keep this true until you've verified the form filler works correctly on real postings. true = fills the form but never clicks submit. Override per-run with: python src/main.py --live

screening_answers.sponsorship_detail_note: Authorized to work; will require employer sponsorship (e.g. H-1B) in the future.

eeo_defaults._comment: Applied to voluntary demographic/EEO questions (race, gender, veteran, disability). Default is to decline. Change only if you want to disclose.

cover_letter.template: I'm excited to apply for the {job_title} role at {company_name}. With 4+ years building distributed backend systems and AI/LLM-integrated pipelines (RAG, vector search, event-driven architecture) across Java, Python, and Go, I believe my experience scaling systems to 50K+ events/sec and cutting latency 50-70% would translate well to this role. I'd welcome the chance to discuss further.
